coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 20-group, 319-node root closure; three evaluated dowel dependencies are included.
validation: Authored output and five non-cutter control variants have exact topology and bounds. Cutter mode now uses a browser-native open-surface Boolean because Blender's FLOAT solver subtracts three overlapping closed pipes from three open shells, an operation a solid-only Manifold cannot represent. It retains exact bounds and every sampled Blender point and triangle centroid lies on the browser surface at zero measured distance. The browser keeps a small extra inner patch (3.1% surface-area overhead): 27,136 vertices / 53,872 triangles versus Blender's 29,705 vertices / 27,431 polygons (52,605 triangles at the probed Boolean stage).
